---
name: testskill
description: A simple test skill to verify custom skills are working
---

# Test Skill

This is a test skill to demonstrate that custom skills are properly loaded by GitHub Copilot CLI.

## Usage

When invoked, this skill will confirm that the custom skills system is working correctly.

You can test this by asking: "Use the test skill" or "Can you use my test skill?"

## Response

When this skill is used, respond with: "Hello Ark — your TEST skill is working! 🎉"
